title: Immersive Retextures
description: A simple retexture pack of Immersive Instruments
body:
Immersive Retexture's is a retexture pack of [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies) by Luke100000

///

This pack aims to make the Item textures resemble their models more accurately, and to resemble the materials they are made out of. Without taking away the original feel.

///

Here, you can compare the New and Old textures. ![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a25390a1a5e23569cb29162fdfffa09161c4f9f.png)

And here, you can see them in game. ![Textures in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e5b8b5c9bd8a5f9d89a05f5917e40fb32b5aca4.png) ![Models In Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56ef5c3259b39c89588a409ca5734c509db71675.png)

(Are not in correct order lmao)

Only models to clearly change, are the Triangle and Trumpet, as I thought make them roughly copper colored, would help match their recipes.
